reason: All FR-03 acceptance criteria are fully met. (1) UnifiedMessage is decorated @dataclass(frozen=True) — mutation test confirms FrozenInstanceError is raised. (2) All seven required fields are present: platform, platform_user_id, unified_user_id, message_type, content, raw_payload, received_at. (3) Platform enum defines all four required values: TELEGRAM, LINE, MESSENGER, WHATSAPP. (4) MessageType enum defines all five required values: TEXT, IMAGE, STICKER, LOCATION, FILE. (5) UnifiedResponse carries content, source, confidence, knowledge_id — exact match to spec. One non-blocking observation: unified_user_id defaults to "" rather than being a positional required argument, and an extra reply_token field is present; neither violates the SRS and both are reasonable design extensions. Test coverage directly exercises frozen constraint and all required fields.
